meta.promotionPolicy: Only promote to data/database.json when official/high-trust source rows and athlete identity are unambiguous. Ambiguous same-name rows remain candidates only.

openPullRequestsChecked.title: Add Numata completion report generator
openPullRequestsChecked.overlapAssessment: Non-overlapping report-only work. It does not change athlete histories, data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, A4 layout, or v5.9.6_LOCK.

recentMergedWorkChecked.title: Add Lot11-13 audit research batch
recentMergedWorkChecked.overlapAssessment: Adjacent previous batch only. No Lot 14-18 coverage.

sourcesChecked.label: PL Commentary Bank main data/database.json roster skeleton
sourcesChecked.purpose: Confirm Lot 14-18 roster identities, team names, divisions, declared bests, aliases, and v5.9.6_LOCK metadata.

sourcesChecked.label: Repository open PR search
sourcesChecked.purpose: Avoid duplicate or conflicting work before adding the isolated batch file.

sourcesChecked.label: Exact-name official/high-trust web sweep
sourcesChecked.purpose: Checked exact Japanese spaced/unspaced names and powerlifting/bench terms against HPA/JPA/IPF/Goodlift/APF-AAPF-style source surfaces. No promotable official or high-trust athlete-history rows were identified in this narrow pass.

sourcesChecked.label: HPA official source-surface sweep
sourcesChecked.purpose: Checked Hokkaido domestic powerlifting and bench result source surface via exact-name terms for Lot 14-18. No row was added because no unambiguous official athlete-history row was identified in this pass.

sourcesChecked.label: JPA / IPF / Goodlift style exact-name sweep
sourcesChecked.purpose: Checked national and international source surfaces for exact-name or romanized-name matches. No confirmed domestic-national or international/world history was identified for this batch.
